chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 3359 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Hearing of case. For hearing of main case. 13.04.2026 None present for the Petitioner. Barrister Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, Advocate for the Respondent. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG. ---------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the Order Sheet reflects that a similar absence prevailed on the previous date, which suggests that the Petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the matter, which stands dismissed accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz
